name: alpha-claw-web-site
description: Public-facing site and status surface for Alpha Claw.

name: Alpha Mem Palace
description: Memory indexing and retrieval workspace built with mempalace for long-horizon project context.

name: Memory Palace Web Frontend
description: Live web interface for browsing memory-palace drawers with search and filtering, exposed behind Cloudflare Access.

name: Hello World Next.js
description: Minimal Next.js app deployed via Docker Compose and exposed publicly through Cloudflare Tunnel.

name: Voice Controller Maintenance Prototype
description: AI-powered vehicle maintenance reporting prototype with VIN/plate lookup, cost estimates, urgency scoring, and shop recommendations.

name: alpha-claw-public-configs
description: Safe public snapshots of non-sensitive configs/docs with versioned changelogs.

name: SpaceTimeDB Chat Prototype
description: Experimental real-time multi-user chat app built with self-hosted SpaceTimeDB + React TypeScript.

name: n8n Local Automation Stack
description: Pinned Docker stack for n8n queue mode with Postgres + Redis, exposed via host-level Cloudflare tunnel.

name: Chatterbox Local API
description: Self-hosted Chatterbox-Turbo voice generation backend for Resonance (local model inference API).

name: Resonance Self-Host Migration
description: Active migration program to run Resonance in local Docker with cloud-by-exception architecture.

name: Paperclip
description: AI-agent company orchestration platform for org structure, goals, budgets, and coordinated execution.

name: Mission Control
description: Local dashboard surface for OpenClaw. Upgraded to v2.0.0 (stable tagged releases only). Running in Docker on port 3005.

name: Voice Prompt AutoResearch
description: Autonomous iterative voice prompt engineering using Karpathy's autoresearch loop — modify → run → evaluate → keep/discard → repeat. Optimizes system prompts and tool-call schemas for production voice AI agents running ~50k calls/month on Vapi.

name: Vapi OpenClaw Voice Bridge
description: Voice-call relay service connecting Vapi tool calls to OpenClaw with caller controls and async response injection.

name: OpenClaw VNC Control
description: Drive-by-wire VNC control CLI for AI agents: observe screen state and issue deterministic pointer/click actions.

name: Gemma 4 Local
description: Local Gemma 4 inference via MLX. Archived 2026-04-04 — prefix cache broken on hybrid attention architectures, making it unviable as an agent model at real context depths.

name: LLM Wiki
description: Persistent compounding knowledge base maintained by LLMs. Shared between Alpha (OpenClaw) and Alpha Hermes. Based on Karpathy's llm-wiki pattern — structured, interlinked markdown pages that accumulate knowledge over time instead of re-deriving it on every query.
